---
title: "March Madness Bracket — Scoring & Rules"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

Welcome to our class March Madness bracket challenge! Points are awarded by round, with an **extra upset bonus in Round 1**.

---

## Scoring by Round

- **Round 1 (64 teams):** 1 point per correct pick  
  - **Upset bonus:** +1 extra point *in Round 1 only* for correctly picking an upset where the **lower seed beats the higher seed**, **excluding 8 vs. 9 games**.
- **Round 2 (32 teams):** 2 points per correct pick
- **Round 3 — Sweet 16:** 3 points per correct pick
- **Round 4 — Elite Eight:** 4 points per correct pick
- **Round 5 — Final Four:** 5 points per correct pick
- **Round 6 — National Championship:** 6 points per correct pick

> “Third round = 3 points” and so on—i.e., the point value increases by 1 each round.

### Upset Definition (Round 1 only)
- An **upset** is when the **numerically larger seed** defeats the **numerically smaller seed** (e.g., a 12 beats a 5).  
- **No upset credit** for 8 vs. 9 matchups.  
- Each correctly predicted eligible upset in **Round 1** earns **+1 extra point**.

---

## Quick Examples

### Example A — Round 1 upset you called correctly
- You picked a **12** to beat a **5**, and it happened.  
- Points: **1 (correct pick)** + **1 (upset bonus)** = **2 points**

### Example B — Round 1 correct pick that is not an upset
- You picked a **2** to beat a **15**, and it happened.  
- Points: **1 point** (no upset bonus)

### Example C — Sweet 16 correct pick
- You picked the winner of a Sweet 16 game correctly.  
- Points: **3 points**

---

## Bonus Points

- **Beat-the-Instructor Bonus:** If your total score **beats my score**, you earn **+1 bonus point**.
- **Placement Bonuses (class leaderboard):**
  - **1st place:** +5
  - **2nd place:** +4
  - **3rd place:** +3

---

<iframe src="cbs-sports-2026-bracket.pdf" width="140%" height="900" style="border: none;">
  Your browser does not support PDFs. 
  <a href="cbs-sports-2026-bracket.pdf">Download the bracket PDF</a>.
</iframe>
